bundle.longDescription: RWM Puppet Master is an AI development orchestrator that coordinates multiple AI CLI platforms (Cursor, Codex, Claude, Gemini, Copilot) using the Ralph Wiggum Method.

security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://localhost:*; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' asset:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://localhost:*
